APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HOWARD, LEROY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD, LEROY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1050 FELL STREET, APT. 24, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL MAY-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED

THIS JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF. JOE STINO IS AWARDED IMMEDIATE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 1050 FELL STREET, APT. 24, SAN FRANCISCO. THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IN THIS MATTER IS FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT IS STAYED UNTIL 5-30-95 THE SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $795 SHALL BE RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY REMAINING ON THE PREMISES AFTER DEFENDANT HOWARD LEAVES SHALL BECOME THE PROPERTY OF THE LANDLORD. DEFENDANT REPRESENTS THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER PERSONS IN POSSESSION ON THE PREMISES. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT MAKE ANY NEGATIVE CREDIT REFERRALS AND PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY WILL SIGN A STIPULATION VACATING THIS JUDGMENT.

IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT THE FILEING FEE OF $80.00 FOR DEFT. LEROY HOWARD FIRST PAPER IN THE ABOVE ACTION HAS NOT BEEN TIMELY PAID. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED THAT THE ANSWER OF DEFT. LEROY HOWARD IN THIS MATTER BE STRICKEN
